Greenlight Level Up (DESCRIPTION) Animation features a girl playing a pinball machine with a yellow ball. It turns into an emoticon with arms and legs. He wears sunglasses, wrist bands, and sneakers. He drops through a blue sky and collects gold coins until he lands on a treasure chest that pours money down into a piggy bank standing in a forest. The piggy bank stands up and flexes his bicep to show off a tattoo that says "4 Lyfe." (SPEECH) [MUSIC PLAYING] SPEAKER 1: From the team on a mission to raise financially smart kids comes Greenlight Level Up, the game-changing money game that unlocks money skills, knowledge, and confidence for life. (DESCRIPTION) A wizard wearing a hat and holding a star-shaped wand appears among swirls of color. (SPEECH) SPEAKER 2: Are you ready? SPEAKER 1: (DESCRIPTION) The emoticon runs down a path with changing landscapes. Gold coins appear above him and he reaches up to grab one. (SPEECH) Cruise through bite-sized educational challenges to earn coins, stars, and XP points, and get rewards. (DESCRIPTION) The emoticon stops in front of a sign above the path that has a question mark in a circle at the top above the words, "How to save?" Spend, Budget, Donate. The emoticon pushes the Budget button, and a gold coin flies out of it into the sky and falls into a glass jar full of coins. A pink line runs across the jar and flips it over. The jar turns into a phone that features an app screen that says "Savings Goal. Headphones. $200.00." (SPEECH) Then put your skills to work in real life. As you learn to earn, save and invest with Greenlight. (DESCRIPTION) The emoticon grabs the phone, and it turns into a skateboard that he rides down a jagged line going up and down. Next, scientists build a rocket and launch it into space. As the rocket flies higher into the atmosphere, the words Saving, Spending, and Investing appear in color blocks. (SPEECH) Built by experts using the latest research and academic and game design, with a best in class curriculum that goes beyond national standards for K through 12 personal financial education. (DESCRIPTION) The emoticon bounces into the middle of several characters who stand on the rocky landscape of a planet. The characters include an octopus wearing boxer shorts with hearts all over them, a muscular pig with a "4 Lyfe" tattoo, a bug in a suit, a goat wearing goggles and carrying a backpack, a man wearing a gold helmet standing by a treasure chest, a grinning planet and cyclops sun with fangs, and a blue cat. (SPEECH) Take your money skills to the next level with Greenlight Level Up. (DESCRIPTION) On the left is a screenshot of the Greenlight app on a smart phone. Logo, Greenlight. Text, Get started today. www.greenlight.com. Greenlight Coins have no cash value or cash equivalent.
